entities.name: Self-Knowledge Deficit
entities.context: V's framework identifying the fundamental bottleneck in effective job seeking as lack of self-awareness, not tactical skills

entities.name: AI
entities.context: Technology that removes friction from application generation, amplifying self-knowledge gap

entities.name: self-knowledge
entities.context: Ability to articulate wants, strengths, and optimal environments - the binding constraint in job seeking

entities.name: friction
entities.context: Pre-AI barriers in application process that previously masked self-knowledge deficits

relationships.context: Deficit is the absence of self-knowledge capacity
AI removes friction, exposing self-knowledge gap as binding constraint
AI eliminates application friction that previously masked deficits
Those with self-knowledge use AI as amplification; those without use it as crutch
